parameters.name: SiteFilter
parameters.label: Sites
parameters.query:
let H = Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
    | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name);
Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by siteId
| join kind=leftouter H on hostId
| extend MetaName = tostring(meta.name), Suffix = substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6)
| project value = tostring(siteId),
          label = coalesce(
              iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ''),
              iif(MetaName != 'default' and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ''),
              strcat(MetaName, ' (', Suffix, ')'))
| order by label asc

content.json:
UniFi Site Manager
Estate-wide visibility across every UniFi-managed site, host, device and ISP link. Site health, device inventory, ISP performance, firmware drift, security posture and admin operations polled every 5 minutes from the Site Manager API. Scope every panel with the time range and Sites filter below; the Hunts tab embeds the 8 packaged hunting queries.

content.query:
let S = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
    | where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId);
let SelectedHostIds = toscalar(S | summarize make_set(hostId));
let H = Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL | where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or id in (SelectedHostIds) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id;
let D = Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id;
let I = SecurityIncident | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | where Title startswith "UniFi Site Manager" | summarize arg_max(LastModifiedTime, *) by IncidentNumber | where Status != "Closed";
union
  (S | summarize V=toreal(count())                                                              | extend Metric="Sites",                Order=1),
  (H | summarize V=toreal(count())                                                              | extend Metric="Hosts",                Order=2),
  (D | summarize V=toreal(count())                                                              | extend Metric="Devices (estate)",     Order=3),
  (D | where status =~ "online"                                                                 | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Online",                Order=4),
  (D | where status =~ "offline"                                                                | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Offline",               Order=5),
  (D | where firmwareStatus in~ ("updateAvailable","updatePending")                             | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Need firmware update", Order=6),
  (S | extend WanUptime=todouble(siteStatistics.percentages.wanUptime)                          | summarize V=todouble(round(avg(WanUptime),1)) | extend Metric="Avg WAN uptime %", Order=7),
  (I | summarize V=toreal(count())                                                              | extend Metric="Open incidents",       Order=8)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V

SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where Title startswith "UniFi Site Manager"
| summarize arg_max(LastModifiedTime, *) by IncidentNumber
| where Status != "Closed"
| extend AgeDays = datetime_diff("day", now(), CreatedTime)
| project Severity, ["Incident #"]=IncidentNumber, Title, Status, ["Alerts"]=array_length(AlertIds), Opened=CreatedTime, ["Last update"]=LastModifiedTime, ["Age (d)"]=AgeDays
| order by Severity asc, Opened desc
content.title: Open UniFi Site Manager-related Sentinel incidents
content.noDataMessage: No open UniFi Site Manager incidents. Enable the 21 packaged analytic rules under Configuration -> Analytics -> Rule templates to start populating this list.

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Title startswith "UniFi Site Manager"
| summarize Incidents=count() by bin(CreatedTime, 1h), Severity
| order by CreatedTime asc
content.title: Incidents created per hour (by severity)
content.noDataMessage: No incidents created in this window.

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Title startswith "UniFi Site Manager"
| summarize arg_max(LastModifiedTime, *) by IncidentNumber
| summarize Incidents=count() by Severity
content.title: Severity mix
content.noDataMessage: No incidents in this window.

content.query:
let _siteNames = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | join kind=leftouter (
        Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL
        | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
        | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name)
      ) on hostId
    | extend MetaName = tostring(meta.name), Suffix = substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6)
    | project siteId = tostring(siteId),
              SiteName = coalesce(
                  iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ""),
                  iif(MetaName != "default" and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ""),
                  strcat(MetaName, " (", Suffix, ")"));
Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend siteId=tostring(siteId),
         Total=toint(siteStatistics.counts.totalDevice),
         Offline=toint(siteStatistics.counts.offlineDevice),
         OfflineGW=toint(siteStatistics.counts.offlineGatewayDevice),
         PendingUpdates=toint(siteStatistics.counts.pendingUpdateDevice),
         CritNotifs=toint(siteStatistics.counts.criticalNotification),
         WanUptime=todouble(siteStatistics.percentages.wanUptime),
         TxRetry=todouble(siteStatistics.percentages.txRetry)
| join kind=leftouter _siteNames on siteId
| extend IssueScore = Offline*5 + OfflineGW*10 + PendingUpdates*1 + CritNotifs*3 + iif(WanUptime < 95, 5, 0)
| where IssueScore > 0
| project SiteName, IssueScore, Offline, OfflineGW, PendingUpdates, CritNotifs, WanUptime, TxRetry
| order by IssueScore desc
content.title: Sites ranked by composite issue score
content.noDataMessage: No sites with issues - estate is healthy.

content.query:
let S = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
    | where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId);
union
  (S | summarize V=toreal(count())                                            | extend Metric="Total sites",        Order=1),
  (S | where isOwner == true                                                  | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Owned",              Order=2),
  (S | extend U=todouble(siteStatistics.percentages.wanUptime) | where U < 95 | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="WAN uptime < 95%",   Order=3),
  (S | extend C=toint(siteStatistics.counts.criticalNotification) | where C>0 | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Critical notifs",    Order=4),
  (S | extend O=toint(siteStatistics.counts.offlineDevice) | where O > 0     | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Has offline devices", Order=5),
  (S | extend P=toint(siteStatistics.counts.pendingUpdateDevice) | where P>0 | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Pending updates",     Order=6),
  (S | extend Insp=tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.inspectionState) | where Insp != "on" | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="DPI off / no inspect", Order=7)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V

let _siteNames = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | join kind=leftouter (
        Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL
        | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
        | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name)
      ) on hostId
    | extend MetaName = tostring(meta.name), Suffix = substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6)
    | project siteId = tostring(siteId),
              SiteName = coalesce(
                  iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ""),
                  iif(MetaName != "default" and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ""),
                  strcat(MetaName, " (", Suffix, ")"));
Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend siteId=tostring(siteId),
         Wired=toint(siteStatistics.counts.wiredClient),
         WiFi=toint(siteStatistics.counts.wifiClient),
         Guest=toint(siteStatistics.counts.guestClient),
         Devices=toint(siteStatistics.counts.totalDevice)
| join kind=leftouter _siteNames on siteId
| project SiteName, Devices, Wired, WiFi, Guest
content.title: Clients + devices per site

content.query:
Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend ISP=tostring(siteStatistics.ispInfo.name),
         Org=tostring(siteStatistics.ispInfo.organization)
| summarize Sites=count(), Orgs=make_set(Org) by ISP
| order by Sites desc
content.title: ISPs in use across the estate

content.query:
let _siteNames = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | join kind=leftouter (
        Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL
        | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
        | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name)
      ) on hostId
    | extend MetaName = tostring(meta.name), Suffix = substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6)
    | project siteId = tostring(siteId),
              SiteName = coalesce(
                  iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ""),
                  iif(MetaName != "default" and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ""),
                  strcat(MetaName, " (", Suffix, ")"));
Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend siteId=tostring(siteId),
         Timezone=tostring(meta.timezone),
         Permission=permission,
         Devices=toint(siteStatistics.counts.totalDevice),
         Offline=toint(siteStatistics.counts.offlineDevice),
         WanUptime=todouble(siteStatistics.percentages.wanUptime),
         TxRetry=todouble(siteStatistics.percentages.txRetry),
         ISP=tostring(siteStatistics.ispInfo.name),
         IPSMode=tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsMode),
         Inspection=tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.inspectionState),
         LastSnapshot=TimeGenerated
| join kind=leftouter _siteNames on siteId
| project SiteName, Permission, Devices, Offline, WanUptime, TxRetry, ISP, IPSMode, Inspection, Timezone, LastSnapshot
| order by SiteName asc
content.title: Full site inventory snapshot

content.query:
let M = Unifi_SiteManager_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| mv-expand p = periods
| extend AvgL=todouble(p.data.wan.avgLatency),
         MaxL=todouble(p.data.wan.maxLatency),
         PL  =todouble(p.data.wan.packetLoss),
         DT  =todouble(p.data.wan.downtime),
         UT  =todouble(p.data.wan.uptime);
union
  (M | summarize V=todouble(round(avg(AvgL),1)) | extend Metric="Avg latency (ms)",   Order=1),
  (M | summarize V=todouble(round(max(MaxL),0)) | extend Metric="Peak latency (ms)",  Order=2),
  (M | summarize V=todouble(round(avg(PL),2))   | extend Metric="Avg packet loss %",  Order=3),
  (M | summarize V=todouble(round(sum(DT),0))   | extend Metric="Total downtime (s)", Order=4),
  (M | summarize V=todouble(round(avg(UT),2))   | extend Metric="Avg uptime %",       Order=5),
  (M | summarize V=toreal(count())              | extend Metric="Samples",            Order=6)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V

let H = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId) | join kind=leftouter (Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id | project hostId=id, FriendlyName=tostring(reportedState.name)) on hostId | extend MetaName=tostring(meta.name), Suffix=substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6) | project siteId=tostring(siteId), SiteName=coalesce(iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ""), iif(MetaName != "default" and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ""), strcat(MetaName, " (", Suffix, ")"));
Unifi_SiteManager_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| mv-expand p = periods
| extend t=todatetime(p.metricTime), L=todouble(p.data.wan.avgLatency)
| where isnotnull(t) and isnotnull(L)
| join kind=leftouter (H) on $left.siteId == $right.siteId
| summarize Latency=avg(L) by bin(t, 30m), SiteName
| order by t asc
content.title: Avg latency (ms) per site, over time
content.noDataMessage: No ISP latency samples in this window.

content.query:
let H = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId) | join kind=leftouter (Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id | project hostId=id, FriendlyName=tostring(reportedState.name)) on hostId | extend MetaName=tostring(meta.name), Suffix=substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6) | project siteId=tostring(siteId), SiteName=coalesce(iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ""), iif(MetaName != "default" and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ""), strcat(MetaName, " (", Suffix, ")"));
Unifi_SiteManager_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| mv-expand p = periods
| extend t=todatetime(p.metricTime), PL=todouble(p.data.wan.packetLoss)
| where isnotnull(t)
| join kind=leftouter (H) on $left.siteId == $right.siteId
| summarize PacketLoss=avg(PL) by bin(t, 30m), SiteName
| order by t asc
content.title: Packet loss % per site, over time
content.noDataMessage: No packet-loss samples in this window.

content.query:
let H = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId) | join kind=leftouter (Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id | project hostId=id, FriendlyName=tostring(reportedState.name)) on hostId | extend MetaName=tostring(meta.name), Suffix=substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6) | project siteId=tostring(siteId), SiteName=coalesce(iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ""), iif(MetaName != "default" and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ""), strcat(MetaName, " (", Suffix, ")"));
Unifi_SiteManager_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| mv-expand p = periods
| extend t=todatetime(p.metricTime),
         Down=todouble(p.data.wan.download_kbps),
         Up  =todouble(p.data.wan.upload_kbps)
| where isnotnull(t)
| join kind=leftouter (H) on $left.siteId == $right.siteId
| summarize DownKbps=avg(Down), UpKbps=avg(Up) by bin(t, 30m), SiteName
| order by t asc
content.title: WAN throughput (down/up kbps) per site, over time
content.noDataMessage: No throughput samples in this window.

content.query:
let H = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId) | join kind=leftouter (Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id | project hostId=id, FriendlyName=tostring(reportedState.name)) on hostId | extend MetaName=tostring(meta.name), Suffix=substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6) | project siteId=tostring(siteId), SiteName=coalesce(iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ""), iif(MetaName != "default" and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ""), strcat(MetaName, " (", Suffix, ")"));
Unifi_SiteManager_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| mv-expand p = periods
| extend UT=todouble(p.data.wan.uptime)
| join kind=leftouter (H) on $left.siteId == $right.siteId
| summarize AvgUptime=round(avg(UT),2), MinUptime=round(min(UT),2), Samples=count() by SiteName
| order by AvgUptime asc
content.title: Per-site WAN uptime over the last 7 days

content.query:
let D = Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id;
union
  (D | summarize V=toreal(count())                                                | extend Metric="Total devices",       Order=1),
  (D | where status =~ "online"                                                   | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Online",              Order=2),
  (D | where status =~ "offline"                                                  | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Offline",             Order=3),
  (D | where firmwareStatus =~ "upToDate"                                         | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Up-to-date firmware", Order=4),
  (D | where firmwareStatus =~ "updateAvailable"                                  | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Updates available",   Order=5),
  (D | where firmwareStatus =~ "updatePending"                                    | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Pending update",      Order=6),
  (D | where isConsole == true                                                    | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Consoles",            Order=7),
  (D | where productLine =~ "protect"                                             | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Protect devices",    Order=8)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V

Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| summarize Count=count() by productLine
| order by Count desc
content.title: Devices by product line

content.query:
Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| summarize Count=count() by firmwareStatus
| order by Count desc
content.title: Firmware status

content.query:
Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| summarize Count=count() by model
| order by Count desc | take 12
content.title: Top 12 models

content.query:
Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| where firmwareStatus != "upToDate" or status != "online"
| extend Issues = strcat_array(pack_array(
    iif(status != "online", strcat("status:", status), ""),
    iif(firmwareStatus != "upToDate", strcat("firmware:", firmwareStatus), "")
  ), ",")
| extend Issues = trim_start(",", trim_end(",", replace_string(Issues, ",,", ",")))
| project name, model, productLine, version, status, firmwareStatus, ip, adoptionTime, Issues
| order by status asc, firmwareStatus asc
content.title: Devices flagged with one or more issues
content.noDataMessage: No devices need attention - estate healthy.

content.query:
Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| project name, model, productLine, version, status, firmwareStatus, ip, mac, isConsole, isManaged, startupTime, adoptionTime
| order by productLine asc, status asc, name asc
content.title: All devices (latest snapshot per device ID)

content.query:
let S = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
    | where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId);
union
  (S | extend M=tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsMode)         | where M =~ "ips"   | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="IPS active",     Order=1),
  (S | extend M=tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsMode)         | where M =~ "ids"   | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="IDS only",       Order=2),
  (S | extend M=tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsMode)         | where M =~ "off"   | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="No IPS/IDS",     Order=3),
  (S | extend I=tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.inspectionState) | where I =~ "on"    | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Inspecting",     Order=4),
  (S | extend I=tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.inspectionState) | where I != "on"    | summarize V=toreal(count()) | extend Metric="Inspect off",    Order=5),
  (S | extend R=toint(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsSignature.rulesCount) | summarize V=todouble(round(avg(R),0)) | extend Metric="Avg sigs / gateway", Order=6),
  (S | extend C=toint(siteStatistics.counts.criticalNotification) | summarize V=todouble(sum(C)) | extend Metric="Critical notifs",  Order=7)
| order by Order asc | project Metric, Value=V

let _siteNames = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | join kind=leftouter (
        Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL
        | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
        | project hostId = id, FriendlyName = tostring(reportedState.name)
      ) on hostId
    | extend MetaName = tostring(meta.name), Suffix = substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6)
    | project siteId = tostring(siteId),
              SiteName = coalesce(
                  iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ""),
                  iif(MetaName != "default" and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ""),
                  strcat(MetaName, " (", Suffix, ")"));
Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
| extend siteId=tostring(siteId),
         IPSMode=tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsMode),
         Inspection=tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.inspectionState),
         RulesCount=toint(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsSignature.rulesCount),
         RulesetType=tostring(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsSignature.type),
         CriticalNotifs=toint(siteStatistics.counts.criticalNotification)
| join kind=leftouter _siteNames on siteId
| project SiteName, IPSMode, Inspection, RulesCount, RulesetType, CriticalNotifs
| order by IPSMode asc, SiteName asc
content.title: Where is IPS/IDS configured and what's its inspection state?

content.query:
let H = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId) | join kind=leftouter (Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id | project hostId=id, FriendlyName=tostring(reportedState.name)) on hostId | extend MetaName=tostring(meta.name), Suffix=substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6) | project siteId=tostring(siteId), SiteName=coalesce(iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ""), iif(MetaName != "default" and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ""), strcat(MetaName, " (", Suffix, ")"));
Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| extend siteId=tostring(siteId), Sigs=toint(siteStatistics.gateway.ipsSignature.rulesCount)
| where isnotnull(Sigs)
| join kind=leftouter H on siteId
| summarize Sigs=max(Sigs) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), SiteName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Live IPS signature count per gateway, over time
content.noDataMessage: No signature-count history yet. Site Manager polls every 5 min.

content.json: Security incidents from analytic rules

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Title startswith "UniFi Site Manager" and (Title contains "IPS" or Title contains "Critical")
| summarize arg_max(LastModifiedTime, *) by IncidentNumber
| project Severity, IncidentNumber, Title, Status, CreatedTime, LastModifiedTime
| order by CreatedTime desc
content.title: Security-related incidents in this window
content.noDataMessage: No security incidents from the IPS/critical rules in this window.

content.query:
let _selectedHostIds = toscalar(
    Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
    | where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | summarize make_set(hostId));
Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or id in (_selectedHostIds)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| extend HostName=tostring(reportedState.name),
         Firmware=tostring(reportedState.controller_uuid),
         Hardware=tostring(reportedState.hardware.shortname),
         LastBackup=todatetime(latestBackupTime),
         LastStateChange=todatetime(lastConnectionStateChange),
         RegistrationTime=todatetime(registrationTime)
| project HostName, hostType, ipAddress, Hardware, isBlocked, owner, LastStateChange, LastBackup, RegistrationTime
| order by HostName asc
content.title: All UniFi consoles / cloud-keys registered

content.query:
let _selectedHostIds = toscalar(
    Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
    | where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | summarize make_set(hostId));
Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or id in (_selectedHostIds)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| extend HostName=tostring(reportedState.name),
         LastBackup=todatetime(latestBackupTime),
         HoursSince=toint((now() - todatetime(latestBackupTime)) / 1h)
| where isnotnull(HoursSince)
| extend Bucket=case(HoursSince < 24, "<24h", HoursSince < 168, "<7d", HoursSince < 720, "<30d", "30+ days")
| summarize Hosts=count() by Bucket
| order by case(Bucket=="<24h",1, Bucket=="<7d",2, Bucket=="<30d",3, 4) asc
content.title: When did each host last back up?

content.query:
let _selectedHostIds = toscalar(
    Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
    | where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId)
    | summarize make_set(hostId));
Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or id in (_selectedHostIds)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| extend HostName=tostring(reportedState.name),
         LastBackup=todatetime(latestBackupTime),
         HoursSinceBackup=toint((now() - todatetime(latestBackupTime)) / 1h)
| where HoursSinceBackup > 48 or isnull(HoursSinceBackup)
| project HostName, hostType, ipAddress, LastBackup, HoursSinceBackup
| order by HoursSinceBackup desc nulls first
content.title: Hosts with stale backups (>48h)
content.noDataMessage: All hosts backed up within the last 48 hours - good hygiene.

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Title startswith "UniFi Site Manager" and (Title contains "adopted" or Title contains "log shipping" or Title contains "data connector")
| summarize arg_max(LastModifiedTime, *) by IncidentNumber
| project Severity, IncidentNumber, Title, Status, CreatedTime
| order by CreatedTime desc
content.title: Operational events captured as Sentinel incidents
content.noDataMessage: No operational events in this window.

content.json: About this tab. Each panel below is an inline preview of one of the 8 saved Hunting Queries that ship with this solution. The result table is the hunt running live against the time range above. For a deeper dive, click ▶ Run in Log Analytics under any hunt - it opens the same KQL in the Logs blade so you can modify it, pivot the time range, save bookmarks, or add rows to an active investigation.
Stability: console churn & device flapping

content.query:
Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize Snapshots=count(), DistinctStates=dcount(lastConnectionStateChange) by id
| where DistinctStates > 1
| order by DistinctStates desc
content.title: Hosts whose connection-state has changed multiple times in 7d
content.noDataMessage: No console group churn - environment stable.

content.query:
Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize StateChanges=dcount(status) by id, name
| where StateChanges > 1
| order by StateChanges desc
content.title: Devices that oscillated online <-> offline in the last 24h
content.noDataMessage: No flapping devices - stable estate.

links.linkLabel: Run 'UniFi Cloud Console Group Churn' in Log Analytics
Run 'UniFi Cloud Device Flapping' in Log Analytics

content.json: Firmware: version diversity & drift hotspots

content.query:
Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| summarize Versions=dcount(version), Models=dcount(model), Devices=count() by productLine
| order by Versions desc
content.title: How many firmware versions per product line?

content.query:
Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| summarize Devices=count(), UpdatesAvailable=countif(firmwareStatus == "updateAvailable"), Pending=countif(firmwareStatus == "updatePending") by model
| where UpdatesAvailable > 0 or Pending > 0
| extend DriftPct = round(100.0 * (UpdatesAvailable + Pending) / Devices, 1)
| order by DriftPct desc
content.title: Models with the largest % of devices needing firmware
content.noDataMessage: Every model is fully patched - clean estate.

links.linkLabel: Run 'UniFi Cloud Firmware Version Diversity' in Log Analytics
Run 'UniFi Cloud Firmware Drift Hotspots' in Log Analytics

content.json: Change control: off-hours adoption & WAN IP changes

content.query:
Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id
| where isnotempty(adoptionTime)
| extend AdoptionTime = todatetime(adoptionTime),
         Hour = hourofday(todatetime(adoptionTime)),
         DayOfWeek = dayofweek(todatetime(adoptionTime)) / 1d
| where Hour < 7 or Hour > 19 or DayOfWeek in (0, 6)
| project AdoptionTime, name, model, productLine
| order by AdoptionTime desc
content.title: Devices adopted outside 07:00-19:00 weekdays
content.noDataMessage: All device adoptions happened during business hours.

content.query:
let H = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId) | join kind=leftouter (Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id | project hostId=id, FriendlyName=tostring(reportedState.name)) on hostId | extend MetaName=tostring(meta.name), Suffix=substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6) | project siteId=tostring(siteId), SiteName=coalesce(iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ""), iif(MetaName != "default" and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ""), strcat(MetaName, " (", Suffix, ")"));
Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| extend siteId=tostring(siteId), Ip=tostring(siteStatistics.wans.WAN.externalIp)
| where isnotempty(Ip)
| summarize DistinctIPs=dcount(Ip), IPList=make_set(Ip) by siteId
| where DistinctIPs > 1
| join kind=leftouter H on siteId
| project SiteName, DistinctIPs, IPList
content.title: Sites where the external WAN IP changed in 7d
content.noDataMessage: All sites kept a stable external WAN IP - no failovers or carrier changes.

links.linkLabel: Run 'UniFi Cloud Off-Hours Device Adoption' in Log Analytics
Run 'UniFi Cloud WAN IP Geo Deviation' in Log Analytics

content.json: WAN performance: persistent issues & latency long-tail

content.query:
let H = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId) | join kind=leftouter (Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id | project hostId=id, FriendlyName=tostring(reportedState.name)) on hostId | extend MetaName=tostring(meta.name), Suffix=substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6) | project siteId=tostring(siteId), SiteName=coalesce(iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ""), iif(MetaName != "default" and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ""), strcat(MetaName, " (", Suffix, ")"));
Unifi_SiteManager_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| mv-expand p = periods
| extend PL=todouble(p.data.wan.packetLoss), Lat=todouble(p.data.wan.avgLatency)
| join kind=leftouter H on siteId
| summarize HighLossPeriods=countif(PL > 1), HighLatPeriods=countif(Lat > 100), Total=count() by SiteName
| where HighLossPeriods > 0 or HighLatPeriods > 0
| extend LossPct=round(100.0*HighLossPeriods/Total, 1), LatPct=round(100.0*HighLatPeriods/Total, 1)
| order by HighLossPeriods desc
content.title: Sites with recurring high packet loss (>1%) or latency (>100ms) over 7d
content.noDataMessage: No persistent WAN issues - ISP links are healthy.

content.query:
let H = Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by tostring(siteId) | join kind=leftouter (Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id | project hostId=id, FriendlyName=tostring(reportedState.name)) on hostId | extend MetaName=tostring(meta.name), Suffix=substring(tostring(siteId), 0, 6) | project siteId=tostring(siteId), SiteName=coalesce(iif(isnotempty(FriendlyName), FriendlyName, ""), iif(MetaName != "default" and isnotempty(MetaName), MetaName, ""), strcat(MetaName, " (", Suffix, ")"));
Unifi_SiteManager_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where "value::all" in~ ({SiteFilter}) or tostring(siteId) in~ ({SiteFilter})
| mv-expand p = periods
| extend ML=todouble(p.data.wan.maxLatency), AL=todouble(p.data.wan.avgLatency)
| join kind=leftouter H on siteId
| summarize AvgPeakLat=round(avg(ML),0), AvgMeanLat=round(avg(AL),0), WorstPeak=round(max(ML),0) by SiteName
| extend Tail = round(AvgPeakLat - AvgMeanLat, 0)
| order by Tail desc
content.title: Where is peak latency dramatically worse than average? (long-tail hotspots)
content.noDataMessage: No latency long-tail signal detected.

links.linkLabel: Run 'UniFi Cloud Persistent WAN Issues' in Log Analytics
Run 'UniFi Cloud Long-Tail Latency Hotspots' in Log Analytics

content.query:
union withsource=Table Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL, Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL, Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL, Unifi_SiteManager_ISPMetrics_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Rows=count() by Table, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Rows ingested per Site Manager table per hour (last 24h)
content.noDataMessage: No Site Manager data ingested in the last 24h - check the connector card under Sentinel > Data connectors.

content.query:
union withsource=Table Unifi_SiteManager_Sites_CL, Unifi_SiteManager_Hosts_CL, Unifi_SiteManager_Devices_CL, Unifi_SiteManager_ISPMetrics_CL
| summarize LastRow=max(TimeGenerated), TotalRows=count() by Table
| extend MinutesAgo=toint((now() - LastRow) / 1m)
| extend Status=case(MinutesAgo < 15, "Fresh", MinutesAgo < 60, "Recent", MinutesAgo < 360, "Stale", "Very Stale")
| project Table, LastRow, MinutesAgo, TotalRows, Status
| order by MinutesAgo asc
content.title: How current is each Site Manager table?

content.query:
_LogOperation
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where _ResourceId contains "Unifi_SiteManager" or Detail contains "Unifi_SiteManager"
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, Level, Detail
| order by TimeGenerated desc | take 100
content.title: Log Analytics operational events touching Site Manager tables
content.noDataMessage: No operational issues recorded in the last 24h.

content.json: UniFi Site Manager (CCF) - Microsoft Sentinel content from the UniFi Site Manager solution. Tables polled every 5 minutes from the Site Manager API: sites, hosts, devices, ISP metrics. Scope every panel via the time range and Sites filter at the top.
